channel.title: Achievements on Daniel J. Gomez
channel.description: Recent content in Achievements on Daniel J. Gomez

item.description:
<div class="row g-4">
 <div class="col-lg-6">
 <h4 class="text-white mb-4"><i class="fas fa-certificate text-cardinal me-2"></i>Advanced Certifications</h4>
 <div class="achievement-list">
 <div class="achievement-item p-3 mb-3 rounded shadow-sm">
 <span class="badge bg-cardinal mb-2">2025-2026</span>
 <h6 class="text-white fw-bold mb-1">AI/ML Fundamentals in Precision Medicine</h6>
 <p class="small text-secondary mb-0">Stanford University School of Medicine</p>
 </div>
 <div class="achievement-item p-3 mb-3 rounded shadow-sm">
 <span class="badge bg-cardinal mb-2">2024</span>
 <h6 class="text-white fw-bold mb-1">Fundamentals of Data Science in Precision Medicine and Cloud Computing</h6>
 <div class="achievement-item p-3 mb-3 rounded shadow-sm">
 <span class="badge bg-cardinal mb-2">2023</span>
 <h6 class="text-white fw-bold mb-1">SSRL RapiData: X-Ray Diffraction</h6>
 <p class="small text-secondary mb-0">SLAC National Accelerator Laboratory</p>
 </div>
 <p class="small text-secondary mb-0">Stanford Data Ocean</p>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>

 <div class="col-lg-6">
 <h4 class="text-white mb-4"><i class="fas fa-microphone-alt text-cardinal me-2"></i>Invited Talks</h4>
 <div class="achievement-list">
 <div class="achievement-item p-3 mb-3 rounded shadow-sm">
 <h6 class="text-white fw-bold mb-1">International Webinar on Cancer Research</h6>
 <p class="small text-secondary mb-2">Topic: Human Retroviruses in Neuro-Oncology</p>
 <span class="text-cardinal small fw-bold">Guest Speaker (2022)</span>
 </div>
 <div class="achievement-item p-3 mb-3 rounded shadow-sm">
 <h6 class="text-white fw-bold mb-1">MDPI Cells 2023 Conference</h6>
 <p class="small text-secondary mb-2">Topic: Golgi Apparatus Dysfunction in Cancer</p>
 <span class="text-cardinal small fw-bold">Conference Speaker (2023)</span>
 </div>
 <div class="achievement-item p-3 mb-3 rounded shadow-sm">
 <h6 class="text-white fw-bold mb-1">CSU Northridge Seminar</h6>
 <p class="small text-secondary mb-2">Topic: Data-Driven Discovery in Oncology</p>
 <span class="text-cardinal small fw-bold">Invited Speaker (2022)</span>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>
</div>
